subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was perused, and with joy was received the news of the organization of gatherings, the chanting of verses, and the raising of melodies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما ملاحظه شد از خبر ترتیب محافل و ترتیل ایات و ترنیم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God
